Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-23-2003 is admitted to probate. Dr. David Hollander Lyon is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-18-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
